The '''Republic Spacelane Bureau''' was the branch of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] to process and map the [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] and its [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperroutes]]. It gave [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] its central [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] coordinates, and fought to nationalise control of information regarding hyperlanes, and established a protected set of [[Hyperspace beacon/Legends|hyperspace beacons]] for major pathways and end the private sector control of charts. It was extant [[4000 BBY/Legends|c.4,000 BBY]], when it serviced the numerous beacons used in the Republic until the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]].

{{Company-stub}}
